title: Generics, Constraints, Inference, and Variance · Inference Brief: Generic Inference
summary: Build reusable selectors and repositories that preserve relationships between keys, inputs, outputs, and callbacks. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts generic inference increment in a relationship-preserving generic data toolkit. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict inference candidates, defaults, contextual inference, and when an explicit type argument hides a design problem.
Use keyof and indexed access types to connect property names with their corresponding value types.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
